An oversized water softener won't regenerate often enough, which means your water can go from soft to hard between cycles. An undersized one will work too hard, regenerate too frequently and wear out faster than it should.

mentions.title: How Do Plumbers Calculate the Right Water Softener Size for Your Home?
mentions.description:
How do plumbers figure out what size water softener a home actually needs? Michael Marugo, Plumbing Operations Manager at ABC Home & Commercial Services, walks through the exact calculation. 

The formula comes down to three factors: the number of people in the household, average daily water usage per person and the hardness level of the local water supply.
